title: Lovely Brazilian Chicken Leg Skewers
description: A romantic Brazilian dish featuring chicken legs, herbal flavors, and double-rise-bread, served in a molcajete, perfect for a dinner date.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken legs to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken legs onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Meanwhile, toast the double-rise-bread cubes by grilling them for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned.
To serve, place the grilled skewers in a molcajete and surround with toasted bread cubes.
Drizzle the skewers with lemon juice and serve immediately.
